name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-63
title: Mojibake propagated to README.md line 75 and other comment locations
description: Beyond workspace-tree.py (RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-32), the same double-encoded mojibake may exist elsewhere. README.md line 75 'login redirects loop on safari' is fine, but inspection of files for common double-UTF8 fingerprints ('Ã¢' or 'â' followed by box-drawing bytes) should sweep workspace-tree.py annotations, any rendered tree output baked into docs, and any feature scaffolds. Add a CI check / lint rule that rejects \xc3\xa2\xc2 byte sequences in source files.
